message:
fix: replace remaining u128-to-u64 truncations with saturating min

Four non-test files had Duration::as_millis()/as_micros() cast via
'as u64' which silently truncates. Use .min(u128::from(u64::MAX))
for consistency with the project-wide truncation fix pattern.

- trace/minimizer.rs: 4 wall_time_ms fields
- record/task.rs: 2 duration_us diagnostic fields
- cli/progress.rs: 2 elapsed_ms fields
- test_ndjson.rs: 1 ts_us field

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -120,7 +120,7 @@ impl NdjsonEvent {
 
         Self {
             v: NDJSON_SCHEMA_VERSION,
-            ts_us: record.elapsed.as_micros() as u64,
+            ts_us: u64::try_from(record.elapsed.as_micros()).unwrap_or(u64::MAX),
             level: record.event.level().name(),
             category: record.event.category(),
             event: event_type_name(&record.event),
